title: onoclea sorbifolia
intro: Onoclea sorbifolia, also known as the umbrella fern or sorrel fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Onocleaceae and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onoclea sorbifolia include its ability to treat conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Onoclea sorbifolia is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used in infusions or capsules.
